layers: the dark smoky landscape behind the figure with winding roads and rocky formations
the hazy blue-green sky at the top of the painting above the horizon
the winding road and rocky terrain on the left side behind the figure
the river valley and bridge on the right side behind the figure
the long dark brown wavy hair parted in the center falling over both shoulders
the smooth pale skin of the face including forehead cheeks and chin
the two dark eyes with subtle lids looking slightly left
the straight nose with soft shadow on the left side
the closed lips with a faint upward curve at the corners
the bare neck and upper chest area below the chin
the two hands resting one over the other on the arm of the chair
the dark greenish-brown dress with gathered folds across the torso
the thin translucent dark veil draped over the hair and shoulders
the stone ledge and wooden chair armrest at the bottom edge
